We find that supervised neural retrievers encode relevance priors that generalize to unseen documents and are consistent across models. These priors create a findability gap: documents with lower prior are systematically harder to retrieve, even when genuinely relevant. This effect appears in supervised dense retrievers but is weaker and less consistent in BM25, and it persists under controlled matched-document comparisons. Using LLM-based explanations, we find that judged-relevant documents tend to be comprehensive, self-contained summaries of mainstream topics, while niche, fragmentary, or highly technical content is often left unjudged. Retrievers internalize this bias, ranking documents with these favored features higher than documents that lack them, independently of their actual relevance. Our findings expose a structural limitation of supervised retrieval: models trained on annotated data do not just learn relevance, but also the implicit document preferences in their training data.
title: Do Neural Retrievers Prefer Certain Documents? Evidence of Learned Relevance Priors
title_translated: 神经检索器是否偏好特定文档？学习到的相关性先验证据
summary_translated: 神经检索器被训练以从标注的查询-文档对中估计查询与文档的相关性。然而，标注协议可能并非纯粹反映相关性：它们仅选择部分文档进行标注，这种选择可能偏向某些文档类型。我们探究监督式双编码器检索器是否隐式学习到一种文档级相关性先验——即在训练过程中，由于标注数据的特性，在表示空间中编码的一种与查询无关的信号。我们通过在冻结的文档嵌入上训练简单分类器来估计这一先验，并在多个信息检索基准上评估三种最先进的检索器。我们发现，监督式神经检索器编码了可泛化至未见文档的相关性先验，且在不同模型间具有一致性。这些先验造成了‘可发现性差距’：即使真正相关，低先验文档也系统性更难被检索。该效应出现在监督密集检索器中，但在BM25中较弱且不一致，并在受控匹配文档比较中依然存在。通过LLM生成解释，我们发现被判定为相关的文档往往是对主流话题的全面、自包含摘要，而小众、片段化或高度技术性的内容常被忽略未标注。检索器内化了这一偏见，优先排序具备这些受青睐特征的文档，而不论其实际相关性。我们的发现揭示了监督检索的一个结构性局限：在标注数据上训练的模型不仅学习相关性，还学习了训练数据中隐含的文档偏好。

summary: Modeling patient trajectories from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) requires reasoning over sparse, noisy, and long-context multimodal sequences. Existing LLM-based multi-agent systems address context length but process patients in isolation, failing to mirror how clinicians leverage accumulated experience from similar prior cases. We present Traj-Evolve, a self-evolving multi-agent system with two complementary evolving mechanisms. First, an Experience Pool (ExPool) acts as a non-parametric memory, indexing rejection-sampled reasoning traces to retrieve similar patients as few-shot contexts. Second, multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) via reward-ranked fine-tuning parametrically optimizes inter-agent and agent-memory collaboration. A leave-one-out cross-retrieval strategy unifies the two, aligning training- and inference-time behavior under retrieval augmentation. On a lung cancer prediction task utilizing up to five years of multimodal EHRs, Traj-Evolve outperforms 9 strong baselines on the overall population and a challenging never-smoker population. Analysis of the evolving dynamics highlights three key findings: (1) expanding the ExPool shifts optimal retrieval from diverse to specific samples; (2) under MARL, the manager agent's prediction loss converges quickly while the worker agents' temporal reasoning continues to benefit from more verified patients; and (3) the two mechanisms are complementary on the predicted risk, where ExPool improves specificity while MARL improves sensitivity.
title: Traj-Evolve: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent System for Patient Trajectory Modeling in Lung Cancer Early Detection
title_translated: Traj-Evolve：一种用于肺癌早期检测中患者轨迹建模的自演化多智能体系统
summary_translated: 从纵向电子健康记录（EHR）中建模患者轨迹需要对稀疏、嘈杂且上下文长的多模态序列进行推理。现有的基于大语言模型的多智能体系统虽然解决了上下文长度问题，但将患者孤立处理，未能反映临床医生如何利用类似既往病例积累的经验。我们提出Traj-Evolve，一种具有两种互补演化机制的自演化多智能体系统。首先，经验池（ExPool）作为非参数化记忆，索引拒绝采样的推理轨迹，以检索相似患者作为少样本上下文；其次，通过奖励排序微调实现多智能体强化学习（MARL），参数化地优化智能体间及智能体-记忆协作。采用留一法交叉检索策略统一二者，在检索增强下对齐训练与推理行为。在利用长达五年多模态EHR数据的肺癌预测任务中，Traj-Evolve在总体人群和具有挑战性的从不吸烟者人群中均优于9个强基线模型。对演化动态的分析揭示了三个关键发现：(1) 扩展ExPool使最优检索从多样化样本转向特定样本；(2) 在MARL下，管理智能体的预测损失快速收敛，而工作智能体的时间推理仍持续受益于更多经验证的患者；(3) 两种机制在风险预测上具有互补性，其中ExPool提升特异性，MARL提升敏感性。

summary: Dense retrieval models exhibit positional bias: retrieval effectiveness degrades when relevant information appears later in a passage (Zeng et al., 2025). We ask whether this bias can be reduced at inference time, without retraining and without sacrificing overall retrieval effectiveness. To this end, we adapt inference-time attention calibration (Schuhmacher et al., 2026) to downstream retrieval and extend it with a strength coefficient lambda that interpolates between the original and fully calibrated attention distributions. Across three embedding models on SQuAD-PosQ and FineWeb-PosQ, we examine how basket size, calibrated layer set, and strength affect the trade-off between positional fairness and retrieval effectiveness, finding that partial calibration frequently outperforms full calibration. A single configuration (B=128, lambda=0.5, 50% layer depth) improves the harmonic mean of nDCG@10 across positional groups on FineWeb-PosQ for all three models without per-model tuning, and applies to both <s>-pooled and last-token-pooled architectures. This default configuration transfers without modification to PosIR, which spans 10 languages and 31 domains, reducing the Position Sensitivity Index in all 16 length-quartile x model x retrieval-setting combinations, while preserving or improving aggregate nDCG@10. We release our extended codebase at this https URL
title: Attention Calibration for Position-Fair Dense Information Retrieval
title_translated: 位置公平性密集信息检索中的注意力校准
summary_translated: 密集检索模型表现出位置偏差：当相关资讯出现在段落较后位置时，检索效果下降（Zeng等，2025）。我们探讨是否可在无需重新训练且不牺牲整体检索效果的前提下，在推理阶段减少这种偏差。为此，我们将推理时注意力校准方法（Schuhmacher等，2026）适配至下游检索任务，并引入强度系数lambda，用于在原始与完全校准的注意力分布之间插值。在SQuAD-PosQ和FineWeb-PosQ三个嵌入模型上的实验表明，篮子大小、校准层集和强度对位置公平性与检索效果之间的权衡有显著影响，部分校准常优于完全校准。单一配置（B=128, lambda=0.5, 50%层深度）在所有三种模型上均提升了FineWeb-PosQ在各位置组上的nDCG@10调和平均值，且无需针对每种模型调参，适用于<s>-池化与最后token池化架构。该默认配置可无修改迁移至跨10种语言、31个领域的PosIR，减少了所有16个长度四分位数×模型×检索设置组合下的位置敏感指数，同时保持或提升整体nDCG@10。代码已公开。

summary: On-Policy distillation (OPD) in large language models is shifting from full-trace KL supervision toward more selective training paradigms. Recent OPD methods increasingly focus on selecting which trajectories to learn from, which tokens are most informative, and which supervision signals are most reliable. Motivated by this trend, we rethink optimization granularity of OPD and propose \fireicon\ FiRe-OPD (Filter, then Reweight), which jointly adjusts supervision signals at both trajectory and token levels. In details, FiRe-OPD first filters trajectories to remove low-quality rollout samples, and then applies soft reweighting within the retained trajectories to emphasize informative tokens. Compared with hard token selection, FiRe-OPD leverages a soft-weighting mechanism to effectively mitigate information loss and enhance optimization stability, thereby achieving finer-grained OPD optimization. We validate the effectiveness of FiRe-OPD across strong-to-weak, single-teacher, and multi-teacher settings, and demonstrate its superiority over recent token-level OPD methods ( (e.g., +6.25 on AIME 2024 in strong-to-weak, +18.81 on Miner in multi-teacher). Our code is available at this https URL .
title: Filter, Then Reweight: Rethinking Optimization Granularity in On-Policy Distillation
title_translated: 先过滤，再重加权：重新思考在线策略蒸馏中的优化粒度
summary_translated: 大型语言模型中的在线策略蒸馏（OPD）正从全轨迹KL监督转向更选择性的训练范式。近期OPD方法越来越关注选择学习哪些轨迹、哪些标记最具信息量以及哪些监督信号最可靠。受此趋势启发，我们重新思考OPD的优化粒度，提出FiRe-OPD（Filter, then Reweight），该方法在轨迹与标记两个层面联合调整监督信号。具体而言，FiRe-OPD首先过滤掉低质量的轨迹样本，然后在保留的轨迹内对信息丰富的标记进行软重加权。相比硬标记选择，FiRe-OPD采用软加权机制有效缓解信息丢失并增强优化稳定性，从而实现更细粒度的OPD优化。我们在强到弱、单教师和多教师等多种设置下验证了FiRe-OPD的有效性，并证明其优于近期的标记级OPD方法（例如在强到弱设置中AIME 2024得分提升+6.25，在多教师设置中Miner任务得分提升+18.81）。代码已公开。

summary: We investigate whether open-source LLMs encode a linearly separable truthfulness signal in their hidden states, and at which network depth this signal is strongest. Across three $7$B--$8$B instruction-tuned models (Llama-3.1-8B, Mistral-7B, Qwen2.5-7B) loaded in $4$-bit NF4 quantization, we extract per-layer hidden states on four hallucination benchmarks (TruthfulQA, HaluEval-QA, FEVER, and a controlled synthetic set) and compare four detection approaches: linear and MLP probes, INSIDE EigenScore, self-consistency, and attention entropy. A linear probe on a single mid-network layer achieves $0.904$--$1.000$ AUROC on held-out splits, while sampling-based detectors do not exceed $0.541$ AUROC under the same protocol. The truthfulness signal is approximately linear: MLP probes rarely surpass linear probes by more than $0.01$ AUROC. Peak probing layers fall in a consistent band across model families on natural-language benchmarks -- blocks~$13$--$18$ of~$32$ for Llama and Mistral, and blocks~$19$--$25$ of~$28$ for Qwen. First-block attention entropy provides a complementary signal in knowledge-grounded settings ($0.866$--$0.941$ AUROC on HaluEval-QA) at no additional inference cost. The low discriminability of sampling methods under this protocol reflects a structural mismatch between paired-label evaluation and the information these methods access, rather than an inherent limitation of those methods. Code and data are released for full reproducibility on a single $8$\,GB GPU.
title: Hallucination Is Linearly Decodable from Mid-Layer Hidden States in Quantized LLMs
title_translated: 幻觉信号在量化LLM中层隐藏状态中可线性解码
summary_translated: 我们研究开源大语言模型是否在其隐藏状态中编码了可线性分离的真实性信号，以及该信号在哪个网络深度最强。在三个7B–8B指令微调模型（Llama-3.1-8B、Mistral-7B、Qwen2.5-7B）以4比特NF4量化加载的情况下，我们在四个幻觉基准测试（TruthfulQA、HaluEval-QA、FEVER和一个受控合成数据集）上提取每层隐藏状态，并比较四种检测方法：线性探测器、MLP探测器、INSIDE EigenScore、自一致性与注意力熵。在单个中层网络上使用线性探测器在保留分割上达到0.904–1.000的AUROC，而基于采样的探测器在同一协议下未超过0.541 AUROC。真实性信号近似线性：MLP探测器很少比线性探测器高出超过0.01 AUROC。峰值探测层在自然语言基准测试中呈现一致区间——Llama和Mistral为第13–18层（共32层），Qwen为第19–25层（共28层）。首层注意力熵在知识依赖场景中提供互补信号（在HaluEval-QA上达到0.866–0.941 AUROC），且无需额外推理成本。在此协议下，采样方法判别力较低，反映出配对标签评估与这些方法所访问信息之间的结构性错配，而非方法本身的固有限制。代码与数据已发布，可在单张8GB GPU上实现完全复现。

summary: Fitting quantitative models to data is a central step in scientific workflows, yet it remains one of the least automated. Recent agent-based systems leverage language and vision-language models (VLMs) to iteratively propose and refine statistical models, but these systems struggle on more challenging modeling tasks. To address these limitations, we introduce VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents, a framework that equips VLMs with a dynamically growing exploration toolkit to guide model refinement through data transformations, hypothesis-driven visualizations, and robust statistical tests. Unlike prior systems that rely on iterative critique alone, VESTA actively explores data before and during refinement by selecting or creating diagnostic tools, which accumulate in the model's context and can be reused later. We evaluate VESTA against established baselines in three toolkit configurations: no tools, static expert-written tools, and dynamic model-written tools. To support this evaluation, we introduce DAWN (Dataset for Automated Workflows and Numerical Modeling), a benchmark targeting distribution fitting and time series modeling with varying difficulty tiers, and culminating in real-world astronomy tasks including modeling initial mass functions and gravitational-wave chirp signals. We find that VESTA's dynamic tool creation outperforms prior agentic pipelines, with the largest gains on complex and domain-specific tasks. We further show that dynamically generated tools are substantially more sophisticated than those produced by existing visual tool-creation systems, covering more diagnostic categories per function and strongly preferring visual outputs that the VLM critic can reason over directly.
title: VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents
title_translated: VESTA：基于统计工具智能体的视觉探索
summary_translated: 将定量模型拟合到数据是科学工作流中的核心步骤，但仍是自动化程度最低的环节之一。近期基于智能体的系统利用语言模型和视觉-语言模型（VLMs）迭代提出并优化统计模型，但在更具挑战性的建模任务上表现不佳。为解决这些局限，我们提出VESTA：视觉探索与统计工具智能体，该框架为VLM配备一个动态增长的探索工具包，通过数据变换、假设驱动的可视化和稳健的统计检验引导模型优化。不同于仅依赖迭代批判的先前系统，VESTA在优化前和优化过程中主动探索数据，通过选择或创建诊断工具，这些工具累积在模型上下文中，可后续复用。我们评估了VESTA在三种工具配置下的表现：无工具、静态专家编写工具和动态模型生成工具。为支持评估，我们引入DAWN（自动化工作流与数值建模数据集），一个面向分布拟合与时间序列建模的基准，包含不同难度层级，并最终延伸至真实天文学任务，如初始质量函数建模和引力波啁啾信号建模。结果表明，VESTA的动态工具生成显著优于现有代理流水线，尤其在复杂和领域特定任务上提升最大。我们进一步证明，动态生成的工具远比现有视觉工具生成系统产生的工具更复杂，每个功能覆盖更多诊断类别，并强烈偏好VLM批评者可直接推理的视觉输出。

summary: Quantizing LLM weights and activations is a standard approach for efficient deployment, but a few extreme outliers can stretch the dynamic range and amplify low-bit quantization errors. Prior transform-based mitigations (e.g., Hadamard rotations) are fixed and data-agnostic, and their optimality for quantization has remained unclear. We derive closed-form optimal linear blockwise transforms for joint weight-activation quantization under standard RTN AbsMax-scaled block quantizers, covering both integer and floating-point formats. The resulting construction, WUSH, combines a Hadamard backbone with a data-dependent second-moment component to form a non-orthogonal transform that is provably near-optimal for FP and INT quantizers under mild assumptions while admitting an efficient fused GPU implementation. Empirically, WUSH improves W4A4 accuracy over the strongest Hadamard-based baselines (e.g., on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct in MXFP4, it gains +2.8 average points with RTN and +0.7 with GPTQ) while delivering up to 5.8$\times$ per-layer throughput over BF16 via FP4 MatMul. Source code is available at this https URL .
title: WUSH: Near-Optimal Adaptive Transforms for LLM Quantization
comment: Published as a conference paper at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026): this https URL
title_translated: WUSH：适用于大语言模型量化的一类近似最优自适应变换
summary_translated: 对大语言模型的权重和激活值进行量化是实现高效部署的标准方法，但少数极端异常值会扩展动态范围并放大低比特量化误差。以往基于变换的缓解方法（如哈达玛旋转）是固定且与数据无关的，其在量化中的最优性一直不明确。本文推导出在标准RTN AbsMax缩放块量化器下，针对权重-激活联合量化的闭式最优线性分块变换，涵盖整数和浮点格式。所提出的WUSH方法结合了哈达玛主干与依赖数据的二阶矩组件，形成一种非正交变换，在温和假设下对FP和INT量化器具有可证明的近似最优性，同时支持高效的融合GPU实现。实验表明，WUSH在最强的基于哈达玛的方法基线基础上显著提升性能（例如在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上，MXFP4环境下RTN方案提升2.8个百分点，GPTQ方案提升0.7个百分点），同时通过FP4矩阵乘法实现每层高达5.8倍于BF16的吞吐量。源代码已公开。
